summary: Persistent mobile shell navigation for Menu, the router-derived current area, Search, Agents, and Inbox.
useWhen: ShellApp is rendering its dedicated below-768px application composition.
avoidWhen: Rendering desktop or tablet shell chrome.
An arbitrary set of product tabs is required.
accessibility: Every item keeps a visible label and accessible name.
Only the active destination exposes aria-current; Menu exposes its controlled pane through aria-expanded.
states: The item order is fixed: Menu, current area, Search, Agents, Inbox.
Reselecting an active destination does not reset its nested state.
responsiveBehavior: Render only below the mobile breakpoint and preserve safe-area clearance.
